title: AutumnPack: Programmer Art Edition
description: An alternate version of Autumnpack that mimics the look of Programmer Art textures
body:
## The greatest Autumn Resource Pack, NOW IN PROGRAMMER ART!

![Screenshot of a forest with Autumn Trees](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/y0XGIeO5/images/55d4ed1695675bedf75bc48380f332e5df1faae8.png)

## InnerToast's AutumnPack: Programmer Art

**Go check out the original 'Jappa-Like' Version ↓**
[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/autumnpack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/autumnpack)
<details>
<summary>General Autumn Changes</summary>

Grass looks dryer and has leaves scattered throughout- 3 Different variations

Saplings have been changed to be more consistent with their realistic counterparts

Leaves are now orange, yellow, and red depending on the type of leaves

Brown Mushrooms have variated amounts when placed

Pumpkin Pie has a dab of whipped cream on it

Golden Apples are now Caramel Apples

Cookies are now frosted and have sprinkles

<details>
<summary>Sapling Guide</summary>

• Oak Sapling → Acorn

• Spruce Sapling → Pinecone

• Birch Sapling → Birch Catkins

• Dark Oak Sapling → Dark Acorn

• Acacia Sapling → Acacia Seed Pods

• Jungle Sapling → Jungle Pods

• Cherry Sapling → Pink Fruit

</details>


<details>
<summary>Leaf color guide</summary>

Oak - Orange

Birch - Yellow

Spruce - Unchanged (green)

Dark Oak - Red

Acacia - Red

Jungle - Green/beige (depends on biome)

(please keep note that leaves might look 'ugly' in some biomes)

</details>

</details>

<details>
<summary>Halloween Changes</summary>

Carved pumpkins and jack-o-lanterns now have 11 different varied faces

Beetroot, Beetroot seeds, and Beetroot Soup are now Candy Corn, Candy Seeds, and Candy Baskets

Bowls and bowl foods are now in Treat Baskets

Suspicious Stew renamed to "Mischievous Brew" and encourages a 'Trick' or a 'Treat'

<details>
<summary>Pumpkin face guide</summary>

(pumpkins change based on place location)

Default

MC Dungeons Logo

Lego (based on the Lego Minecraft design)

Creeper

Ghast

Ghost

Derp Face

Happy

Mad

Spooked

InnerToast (self promo lol)

</details>

</details>

---
## Other Projects
[![Autumnpack Family of Resource Packs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60d847c1aeaa2c92c0ea9b7dba65acf6279dea99.png)](https://modrinth.com/collection/QeRymyhi) [![Autumnpack fall vibes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b472cd2309ea512f629b201f41ab4b38432f1f0.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/autumnpack-fall-vibes-only) [![Autumnpack Bushy Leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d5aadea77786161b63adb012d7c8d07ffa2fe74.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/autumnpack-bushy) [![Autumnpack Leaf Piles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78aeab53000fc0f7be87e0bf6b81d34936201a97.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/autumnpack-leaf-piles) [![Wilder Wildflowers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xYNlkSJk/images/e58507f20061f05dbb2e5fc5a922658ea8706b28.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wilder-wildflowers)
---
If you enjoy, please consider checking out my other work! https://linktr.ee/innertoast

If you plan on featuring this in a YouTube Video, please credit my name and put the link in the comments. (It's so I can tell who is using the resource pack)
